justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly understood and processed all temporal requests, including specific dates and times, and adjusted its search accordingly.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative slots when the user's initial preference was unavailable, providing reasonable options without being overwhelming.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient, avoiding unnecessary turns and quickly confirming the booking once the user made a selection.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the desired appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully after the initial preferred time was unavailable, offering new options and maintaining context throughout the conversation.
